Title: Genki ga modotta zo!! 100-bai chô jûryoku no naka no Gokû
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Son Goku, still in the magnetic storm, attempts to save himself before he is crushed by the gravity; Vegeta and Zarbon fight a rematch as Kuririn and Buruma watch in fear; Son Gohan flies back with the Dragon Ball he located.
